description: Artists where exhaustive automated portrait research could not verify identity. Do not assign portraits until a curator confirms the correct person.

artists.name: Len D
artists.reason: No verified Spotify, RA, Discogs, or Beatport artist profile matches this catalog entry. Name collides with Len Faki, Lenny Dee, and other Len-* artists.

artists.name: Debora Alessio
artists.reason: No DJ or producer named Debora Alessio found in Milan hard-techno scene. Debora Savasto is a different artist (melodic/tech house) and must not be used.

artists.name: Psyk32
